steps.assistant_text: MIPS instruction classifier (jump/branch-to-register detector, 37 insns). The documented permuter-immune register-renumber cap (target srl a1; andi t6,a1; or a1,t6,zero AND-into-temp-copy-back vs 7.1 -O1 andi a1,a1 in-place) is the 7.1-only copy-propagation fold: IDO 5.3 -O1 emits the temp+copy-back form from the identical switch-on-opcode C. Third crack of the 5.3-vs-7.1 temp-rematerialization class. Single-function unit flipped wholesale to 5.3 cc.
